From the perfect Quidditch in the pb I got the day before, to this terrible one, but what can you do? Hardest part of the run. Epsxe 1.9.25, there was some weird lag but it didn't affect gameplay luckily.

# THE GREAT LABOUR ![](/static/blob/yzro5wjz.png)

Second attempt of the day after failing Deathday Skip before and I am honestly amazed with how well this went... Not everything was optimal and perfect but considering that I very rarely run this category I will absolutely take this time, nice PB!

Not a huge improvement but its a PB and my first sub 1:40.  Also lost 40+ seconds on Deathday :(
